mapper.sql: id, user_id, pro_user_id, status, remark, create_time
mapper.select:
select IFNULL(count(p.user_id),0)as userNum, p.pro_user_id as userId, u.email as account, u.remark from w_user_pro as p left join w_user_info as u on u.user_id = p.pro_user_id where 1 = 1
and (u.phone = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or u.email = #{account,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
group by p.pro_user_id

select up.id, up.user_id, up.pro_user_id, up.status, up.remark, up.create_time,u.email as proUserAccount from w_user_pro as up left join w_user_info as u on u.user_id = up.pro_user_id where up.user_id in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select up.id, up.user_id, up.pro_user_id, up.status, up.remark, up.create_time,u.email as userAccount from w_user_pro as up left join w_user_info as u on u.user_id = up.user_id where up.pro_user_id = #{proUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select up.id, up.user_id, up.pro_user_id, up.status, up.remark, up.create_time,u.email as userAccount from w_user_pro as up left join w_user_info as u on u.user_id = up.user_id where up.pro_user_id in
#{item,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into w_user_pro (user_id, pro_user_id, status, remark, create_time) values (#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{proUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into w_user_pro
user_id,
pro_user_id,
status,
remark,
create_time,
#{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{proUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update w_user_pro
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pro_user_id = #{proUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update w_user_pro set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pro_user_id = #{proUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select DATE_FORMAT(u.create_time, '%Y-%m') as monthStr from w_user_pro as p left join w_user_info as u on u.user_id = p.pro_user_id where p.user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
